tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Fix prettier formatting on pre-existing files

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Just tell me pass/fail and any failures.

session.tool_result:

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant: Now let me signal ended and clean up impl context:
session.tool_result:
🚀 Submitting PR...
Resolving branch and plan context... Committing uncommitted changes... Checking for existing PR... Phase 1: Creating or Updating PR PR #9159 found (already exists)
Phase 2: Getting diff and plan context Incorporating plan #9159

tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Read plan and load context (skills, related docs)', 'status': 'completed', '...[truncated 793 chars]...and submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Signaling ended and submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
## Summary
**PR #9159**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9159
### Files Created
1. **`src/erk/core/impl_run_parser.py`** — Pure parsing module with frozen dataclasses (`ToolAction`, `ImplRunSummary`) and three main functions: - `extract_stream_json_lines()` — Strips GH Actions timestamps, finds the implementation step section, extracts JSON lines - `parse_impl_run_summary()` — Walks JSONL lines building a structured summary (session ID, model, tools, errors, files) - `format_summary()` — Human-readable rendering
2. **`src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/debug_impl_run.py`** — Exec script that: - Accepts run IDs (numeric or GitHub Actions URLs) - Fetches jobs via `gh api` REST endpoint (full untruncated logs) - Finds the "implement" job automatically - Outputs human-readable summary or `--json` format
3. **`tests/unit/core/test_impl_run_parser.py`** — 18 parser unit tests covering timestamp stripping, JSON extraction, summary parsing, error handling, deduplication, truncation
4. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_debug_impl_run.py`** — 13 exec script tests covering URL parsing, job finding, CLI integration with mocked subprocess calls
5. **`.claude/commands/local/debug-impl-run.md`** — Local slash command for Claude to run the debugger and interpret results
### Files Modified
- **`src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py`** — Registered `debug_impl_run` command - **`.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`** — Auto-regenerated
### All CI checks pass (6042+ unit tests, lint, format, type checking)
